news.t: Victory Portfolios II To Transfer Listing of Six ETFs to Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: USVM is an equity ETF with a total of 293 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vishay Intertechnology stock at 0.76%, TD SYNNEX at 0.73%, Ellington Financial at 0.70%, Apple Hospitality REIT at 0.66%, and Broadstone Net Lease at 0.65%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares US Small Mid Cap Value Momentum ETF (USVM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund tracks an index of small- and mid-cap US stocks that are selected by equal parts value and momentum, and weighted by volatility. USVM was launched on Oct 24, 2017 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Nasdaq Victory US Small Mid Cap Value Momentum Index

data.title: Victory Portfolios II To Transfer Listing of Six ETFs to Nasdaq
data.text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Victory Portfolios II today announced plans to transfer the listing of six ETFs from NYSE to Nasdaq on or around November 1, 2022.
